runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Python", "build_system": "pip", "package_manager": "pip", "build_commands": [], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates build-essential libssl-dev libffi-dev libxml2-dev libxslt1-dev zlib1g-dev", "rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "3.11", "system_packages": ["git", "ca-certificates", "build-essential", "libssl-dev", "libffi-dev", "libxml2-dev", "libxslt1-dev", "zlib1g-dev"]}, "repo_type": "cli_tool", "base_image": "python:3.11-bookworm", "base_image_rationale": "Official Python 3.11 image on Debian Bookworm provides a stable Python runtime suitable for sqlmap without extra setup.", "pitfalls": ["sqlmap historically supports Python 2.7; Python 3.11 may require code compatibility fixes.", "The project ships bundled third-party libraries under thirdparty; some may not compile in newer environments or may have licensing considerations.", "No explicit requirements.txt is present in the repository; dependencies may be managed manually or rely on bundled thirdparty modules."], "notes": "The blueprint targets a minimal Python CLI environment; PyPy/older Python variants used in CI are not covered here due to lack of matching base image tags in official images."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM python:3.11-bookworm

# Basic environment setup for building and running sqlmap from source
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    LANG=C.UTF-8

# Working directory inside the container
WORKDIR /app

# Install system dependencies required to build some bundled third-party libraries
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
        build-essential \
        libssl-dev \
        libffi-dev \
        libxml2-dev \
        libxslt1-dev \
        zlib1g-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the repository contents into the image
COPY . .

# (Optional) Pre-compile Python sources to speed up startup
RUN python3 -m compileall -q .

# Ensure Python can find the project modules
ENV PYTHONPATH=/app:$PYTHONPATH

# Default command: display help for sqlmap when container starts without args
ENTRYPOINT ["python3", "sqlmap.py"]
CMD ["--help"]

artifacts.content:
FROM python:3.11-bookworm

# Basic environment setup for building and running sqlmap from source
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    LANG=C.UTF-8

# Working directory inside the container
WORKDIR /app

# Install system dependencies required to build some bundled third-party libraries
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
        build-essential \
        libssl-dev \
        libffi-dev \
        libxml2-dev \
        libxslt1-dev \
        zlib1g-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the repository contents into the image
COPY . .

# (Optional) Pre-compile Python sources to speed up startup
RUN python3 -m compileall -q .

# Ensure Python can find the project modules
ENV PYTHONPATH=/app:$PYTHONPATH

# Default command: display help for sqlmap when container starts without args
ENTRYPOINT ["python3", "sqlmap.py"]
CMD ["--help"]
